cooperates.cooperate_desc: Popol and kupa with floryn buff is indestructible.
Hylos HP  with his Ultimate greatly helps popol and kupa with their ambush and fast speed.

counters.counter_desc: sMiya is weak at early game so try to be more agressive.
Her ultimate will make kupa's bite unusable.
This guy is a vain for popol users.
Fanny is strong but with good timing you can easily defeat her.

dominants.dominant_desc: Popol and kupa is very strong specially in 1v1 and early game. Take advantage of it by abusing your enemy by veing aggressive in ambushes and only using you're skills on the heroes while being passive on enemy minions. Only popol and kupa can use traps and see them on on bushes so dont hesitate to use your traps on bushes for added awareness and protection for enemy ambushes.

They are dominant pushers so try to push through towers and enemy heroes. But still keep on mind even if the enemy heroes are at 1% hp dont try to follow specially if there are enemies nearby since they have no scape skill.

emblems.emblem_desc: Popol and kupa are very strong in the early games even without items yet, so its better to choose this emblem with attck speed and scape emblems to help him move and position him self while kupa is attacking.

equips.equip_desc:
First item is boots depending on the enemy core build if its mage or physical you can change it between tough or warrior boots.

Next is sea halberd ,mostly this is used especially for tanks and ambushes and deals great damage.

Blade of Despair now you should know popol and kupa is mostly kupa doing the damage and stun Blade of despair with its Damage output help them bring its true damage.

Windtalker is the 4th item this is for the mid game you will surprise them with how fast their hp dwindle. 

Then we add the Rose gold Meteor for added protection on those burst damage heroes and lastly to one hit combo the enemy we will finish it with malefic roar for added penetration.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kupa works well with any tank but taunt tanks are more compatible since it ensures popol can hit enemies without getting hurt.

counters.counter_desc: Kupa is effective in single target damage. However with Carmilla and a bit of luck he will be able to finish entire teams if the conditions so arises
Popol has cc but wanwans purify makes it useless
Popol needs to close the distance to do damage but ixia is able to kite him without getting near thus rendering his cc useless.
Hanabis shield and bouncing damage makes it a bit hard to win with her.
Kimmy has only one mobility skill so locking on would be easy in this case.
Just wait for her ult to finish.

dominants.dominant_desc: During early game harass your enemy gold laner by using first skill and calling him back. Try to zone out the enemy as much as possible while staying at a safe position.

After you have got your ultimate try and bait your enemies to attack you. Then use ultimate and first skill to trap them. Use third skill behind the enemy retreat path to effectively trap him even more. Remember to place trap on three major place depending on playstyle. If you are playing offensive place one  in the bush near enemy turret and one in the bush behind the gold crab. If your are playing defensive then place it in the bush near the bug monster and one in the bush on the left side of your turret and one in the middle bush on the right side.

During this time set traps in places you think the enemy would camp and camp in bushes yourself. If the enemy is single and squishy launch the 4>1>3 >basic attack combo to kill them set a trap and camp in a new place. Try to target the enemy marksman with Kupa as your tank and kite them. Same for mages.

emblems.emblem_desc: Fatal for that early game critchance. Put yourself together since you need Kupas enhanced form most of the times and temporal reign to further harass with skills.

equips.equip_desc: Cd boots for ultimate. BOD for early game damage. Windtalker for faster damage. Berserkers fury for extra damage. GDS for crit chance and gap closing ability and DHS for tanks enemies

hero.hero_overview: Popol and Kupa are a versatile duo who can fit three roles. You can play him as jungle, roam or the designated role of marksman. He excels in gold but is also quite effective at jungle.
hero.hero_strength:
-Has good cc which most marksmen lack
-Is able to provide vision over a large area with his traps
-Has shields
-Easy to master and play
-low cd
hero.hero_weakness:
-Dependent on kupa
-Weak against aoe damage and single target damage
-Position could be revealed due to kupa
-Weak against multiple enemies

hero.hero_overview: Popol and Kupal is a hero who is very strong in any season. He is a marksman who is strong in pushing towers and taking buffs. He has abilities of various types which will help make it difficult for enemies to get close to him to kill him.
hero.hero_strength: Popol and kupa are strong in the early and late game. The advantages of popol and kupa are that they have a lot of crowd control and are strong in team fights and they also have an advantage in jungles because they are fast in farm so he can quickly rotate to his teammates to help in their respective lanes.
hero.hero_weakness: Some of Popol and Kupa's weaknesses are his counters, like Mellisa, Belerick, Hanabi, and heroes with a lot of range. Popol's weakness is also when Kupa is not there, because he is there.It's taking strength, so don't let Kupa disappear too soon.

hero.hero_overview: Popol and Kupa are a powerful duo in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, and together they provide great support to the team on the battlefield. Popol is a fast and strategic attacking hunter, while Kupa is his loyal wolf, acting as protection and support.
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths:
1. Versatility: Popol and Kupa are adaptable for close combat and ranged attacks.
2. CC (Crowd Control): They have several skills that slow and immobilize enemies.
3. Balance of defense and offense: Kupa tanks enemies, giving Popol an opportunity to attack.
hero.hero_weakness:
Game Tactics:

Strategically place Popol's traps, gain visibility on the map, and analyze enemies. Skillfully manage the Cup to tank enemies and defend against attacks.

This requires playing heroes, good planning, and teamwork.

hero.hero_overview:
Boy and an lcefield Wolf, partners who understand each other well.
The Feldans are an ordinary nomad tribe in the middle of Northern Vale. Like many local people, they reside
near the forest and live a peaceful and slow-paced life as hunters.
But there was one exception. Popol, a naughty boy who had been known as the expert prankster and little
adventurer of the tribe, always seemed to be at the center of attention. Unlike the other quiet and composed
Northern Valers, he was full of vigor and imagination. Thanks to the warrior tradition of Northern Vale, Popol
mastered the art of spear-throwing since his childhood. He often joined the adults in their hunting and returned
with a cart full of prey.
Listening to the adults singing songs about legendary heroes after drinking was his favorite pastime. He dreamt
of becoming one of them and also have his name sung by others like Popol the Fearless.
However, his tribesmen didn't take his ambition seriously and laughed about it as some childish daydream.
Popol apparently couldn't stand that. In order to impress the others, he pulled all kinds of well-schemed pranks
on them, resulting only in the villagers, especially kids, seeing him as a freak and stayed away from him.
The more alienated he was, the more eager he became to draw their attention by pulling even more pranks.
However, that kept achieving opposite effects. In the end he had no friends left.
Alone and desperate, he decided to do something extraordinary to reverse his image once and for all.
On a dark night, Popol left the village and ventured into the mountains. He planned to kill a ferocious frost wolf He stumbled into the thick forest and investigated his surroundings curiously. He lost orientation in the dark and
fell into a trap.
The first thing he saw at the bottom of the hole was a pair of green glowing eyes, which scared him off his feet.
But when moonlight shone into the trap, he saw the owner of the eyes - a trapped frost wolf whom he later.
hero.hero_strength: Popol and Kupa are strong in the jungle lane. When you use him, you have to be smart about the rotation so he doesn't get bogged down. You just need items to make him stronger.
hero.hero_weakness: His weakness is if someone invades him like Hilda, Terizla, and Fredlin.

complete package

- Endless battle for lifesteal

So this item ferpect build for popol and kupa.

hero.hero_overview: Popol and Kufa is hero with twice the strength, because they have a kupa, they are the greatest friends in the world. can be used to counter meta assassins now.
hero.hero_strength: Their strength lies in their kufa bite when activating their ultimate, and their sharp spears as reliable enemy slayers. because Popol has CC stun, it is very useful for line 1 vs 1 or during war
hero.hero_weakness: His weakness was that when his true friend died, popol only became a weakness for an assasin to kidnap. In my opinion, there is nothing difficult about using Popol, because this hero has CC and Kupa as a hitman in the front guard

spell.spell_desc: This spell is very suitable for popols because during war they use flicker to find the best position. and when ganging, flicker is very useful for going backwards.
